meaning: n.脂肪,肥肉;adj.肥大的,丰满的,肥的,胖的,油腻的;vt.养肥,在...中加入脂肪;vi.长肥;File Allocation Table,文件分配表
examples: Excess food is stored as fat.
This dress makes me look fat.
The manager was fat and jolly.
But he admits that people should stick to reduced-fat hamburger, and limit their egg intake.
Foods also scored points for having low amounts of added sugar, sodium and saturated fat.
